summary: Tested 18 Foundation assertions: all 18 passed. Page loads cleanly with zero console errors, all 4 tabs switch correctly, CDN libraries load (LightweightCharts and Plotly), dark theme design system properly applied, Schema 4A data loads and parses, loading/error states work, index.html navigation works, run metadata displayed, responsive layout maintains integrity, Perplexity attribution present, all 3 fixture data files valid, tab transitions render under 1 second (10ms), and all Plotly charts use correct dark theme colors.
